mapper.sql: id, item_key, label, item_type, page_mode, business_kind, description, default_todo_page, default_done_page, system_flag, sort, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from task_page_catalog order by sort nulls last, id
select from task_page_catalog where status = #{status} order by sort nulls last, id
mapper.update: update task_page_catalog set item_key = #{itemKey}, label = #{label}, item_type = #{itemType}, page_mode = #{pageMode}, business_kind = #{businessKind}, description = #{description}, default_todo_page = #{defaultTodoPage}, default_done_page = #{defaultDonePage}, system_flag = #{systemFlag}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
